---
name: Feature Request
about: Propose new features or improvements to the product.
title: "[FEAT] - Short, Actionable Title of Feature"
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

### Goal / User Story
*Start with a user story format:* **As a** `<type of user>`, **I want to** `<goal>` **so that** `<benefit>`.
*(Example: As an administrator, I want to bulk-delete users so that I can clean up inactive accounts efficiently.)*

### Problem Description
A clear and concise description of the problem or inefficiency you are experiencing. Why is this feature needed? What negative impact does it have on the user experience today? *(This should elaborate on the 'why' from the Goal section).*

### Proposed Solution
Describe exactly what you want to happen. Be as detailed as possible, including mockups or flow diagrams if necessary. If this involves changes to existing functionality, point out where those changes must occur.

### Success Criteria & Acceptance Tests
*How will we know when this feature is done?* Define specific, testable conditions that must be met.
- Given [context], When [action] occurs, Then [expected result].
*(Example: The user should receive a confirmation email within 5 seconds of saving.)*

### Alternatives Considered / Scope Limitations
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered (e.g., "We could use X library instead," or "This only needs to work for paid users"). This helps prevent scope creep later.

### Additional Context / Screenshots
Add any other context, screenshots, or links to documentation here.
